Xu You Ť®ĪśĒł
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu You (Ť®ĪśĒł). Local warlord, insulted Cao Cao and riled him until Du Xi calmed Cao Cao down. Xu You was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
